title: Stocks end mixed as investors digest inflation data
summary: Major U.S. indexes ended mixed after investors reviewed new inflation data and debated what it could mean for interest rates and corporate earnings.
key_points: Inflation data may affect central bank policy expectations.
Investors remain cautious about future rate decisions.

title: Tech shares lead gains after strong earnings outlook
summary: Technology companies led market gains after several firms gave stronger-than-expected earnings outlooks, boosting investor confidence in the sector.
key_points: Positive guidance improved sentiment toward technology stocks.
Earnings expectations remain an important market driver.
Sector concentration risk may still matter for investors.

title: Bond yields rise as markets reassess rate path
summary: Government bond yields moved higher as markets reassessed the likely path of interest rates in light of new economic data.
key_points: Higher yields can affect bond prices.
Interest rate expectations often influence both stocks and bonds.
Fixed-income investors monitor rate sensitivity closely.

title: Investors rotate toward defensive sectors amid uncertainty
summary: Some investors shifted toward defensive sectors such as healthcare and consumer staples as uncertainty around growth and inflation remained elevated.
key_points: Defensive sectors are sometimes favored during uncertainty.
Rotation between sectors can change portfolio behavior.
Diversification can help reduce concentration in one market theme.
